overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a vibrant neon-lit dystopian city. The player observes a purple sports car passing by on the street, then turns into a narrow back alley filled with trash, graffiti, and neon-signed storefronts, eventually emerging onto a main thoroughfare beneath an elevated highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with commercial buildings and parked vehicles

events.description: begins walking forward alongside the street as the purple sports car passes by

agents.ego_description: walking along the city street observing the surroundings and the passing purple sports car

notable_agents.action: purple Mizutani sports car driving past from right to left along the street

entered.detail: large yellow commercial truck parked at the street corner
sleek purple sports car with white stripes and visible branding
multi-story building with large digital billboards and neon signage
large illuminated advertisements mounted on building facades
industrial AC units mounted on the exterior wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit urban street corner in a cyberpunk city. A yellow utility truck is parked nearby while a sleek purple sports car drives past. The player walks forward along the asphalt street, passing commercial buildings adorned with large digital billboards and neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with trash, graffiti, and industrial elements

events.description: turns right from the main street into a narrow alleyway between buildings
passes steam rising from a vent and approaches trash dumpsters in the enclosed alley

agents.ego_description: turning into and descending into a narrow back alley, moving from bright sunlight into shadow

entered.detail: narrow opening between buildings leading into the service alley
tall concrete walls lining the alley sides
large green industrial dumpsters overflowing with garbage
walls covered in colorful spray paint and street art
steam rising from a grate on the alley floor

segments.scene_description: The player turns from the bustling street into a narrow, shadowed service alley. The environment shifts from open and bright to enclosed and gritty, with concrete walls covered in graffiti, industrial trash dumpsters, and steam rising from floor vents. The transition creates a stark contrast between the commercial street and the back alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with neon-signed bars and shops

events.description: passes a seated individual near the Hooch Heaven storefront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow passage, passing neon-lit storefronts and vending machines

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the Hooch Heaven bar entrance

entered.detail: yellow and red neon sign for a bar with open shutters
bright green neon sign with cursive lettering
circular pink and blue neon sign with Japanese text
teal and yellow storefront sign reading PAWNSHOP
red and blue automated vending machines with illuminated displays
large metal exhaust fans mounted on the building exterior
purple neon sign with Japanese characters

segments.scene_description: Walking through the narrow commercial alley, the player passes various neon-signed establishments including Hooch Heaven and Turkish Delights. The passage is cluttered with trash bags, vending machines, and industrial equipment. A lone NPC sits on a bench near one of the storefronts. The alley maintains an enclosed, gritty atmosphere with mixed natural and neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza under elevated highway with city views

events.description: exits the narrow alley into a wide open area beneath an elevated highway
approaches the street crossing under the overpass with increased visibility of distant cityscape

agents.ego_description: emerging from the confined alley into a wider urban space, approaching a main street intersection under the highway

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrians walking on the crosswalk under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway casting shadows over the area
green and red food vending machine with BURRITO XXL signage
multi-lane road with moving traffic visible in the distance
tall futuristic towers with large digital displays and advertisements
curved on-ramp structure connecting to the main highway

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the narrow alley into a wide plaza beneath a massive elevated highway. The space opens up dramatically, revealing towering cyberpunk skyscrapers in the distance adorned with giant digital billboards. The environment transitions from enclosed and gritty to open and expansive, with the overpass structure dominating the overhead space and pedestrians visible walking on distant crosswalks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, commercial urban street through a gritty service alley and into a massive open plaza. It begins at a sunlit corner where a purple sports car glides past a parked yellow utility truck, moving forward amidst towering digital billboards and neon signs. As the camera turns away from the bustling thoroughfare, the environment shifts abruptly into a narrow, shadowed alleyway filled with graffiti, industrial dumpsters, and rising steam. The path continues through this enclosed space, passing cluttered storefronts like Hooch Heaven and Turkish Delights, before the claustrophobic walls finally give way to a wide expanse. The scene opens dramatically beneath a massive elevated highway, revealing a sprawling vista of distant skyscrapers and giant billboards under the dominating structure of the overpass.
